title: The Girl of the Neighbourhood
writer: Nikos Hatziapostolou, Ionas Kostagiannidis, Andreas Labrinos
actors: Smaroula Giouli, Orestis Makris, Giorgos Foundas
plot: In the shadow of Acropolis, an honest man dreams of marrying the charming daughter of a poor pedlar; however, a chance encounter with a professional philanderer will fill her heart with delusions of grandeur. Are they meant to be ...
